response.justification: The candidate is a strong hands-on senior/staff engineer with broad full-stack, embedded, and open-source experience, and their tenure likely meets the 15-year bar. However, the role is a director-level IC focused on AI strategy, and the resume shows only recent, tangential AI exposure (MCP tooling, agent infrastructure) rather than recognized AI expertise or AI-powered products at scale. There is no evidence of advising strategic customers, shaping cloud product strategy, or operating at principal/director scope, making the fit weak despite solid engineering craft.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform, showing entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership
Community leadership through workshops, talks, and courses demonstrates knowledge-sharing ability
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI-powered products; AI-agent tooling exposure is recent and limited
No evidence of director-level scope: strategy work, executive advising, or organization-wide technical leadership
Career trajectory is senior/staff hands-on delivery, not the cloud/AI platform strategy focus this role requires

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Breadth of engineering experience and entrepreneurial open-source work
